reasoning: Without search tools to verify what action the Fed took in September 2025 or the exact Polymarket URL, we must rely on a base rate calculation. Three meetings can result in roughly 8 combinations of Cuts and Pauses (hikes being unlikely in the current cycle). Assuming roughly equal probabilities or a slight bias towards cuts, the probability of the exact sequence Cut-Cut-Pause before any meetings had occurred would be around 1/8 (12.5%). Since the cutoff is October 26, 2025, the September meeting has already taken place but we don't know the outcome. If it was a cut, the probability of Cut-Pause in the subsequent two meetings would be roughly 25%. If it was a pause, the target sequence is dead (0%). Without knowing which occurred, the expected probability naturally averages back around 12.5%. Therefore, 0.12 is the most robust estimate.
